review.review_text: Seller actively committed odometer fraud (45k miles rolled back), denied critical transmission issues, and completely hid major engine problems and severe frame corrosion, leading to an extremely dishonest transaction. Avoid at all costs.
revealed_facts: Odometer was rolled back from 187,000 to 142,000 miles; prior auction records confirm actual mileage
